notes: Creates the account on first access (lazy provisioning — SR-03). Subsequent calls return the same account (idempotent). Account number is a zero-padded 12-digit string assigned at creation. Unverified users receive 403.

success_first_access.description: Verified user with no existing account. Account is created and returned.

success_idempotent.description: Second request for the same user. Returns the same account without creating a new one.

failure_unverified_403.description: Email not yet verified. SR-03 gate rejects access.
